balance().custom:example: WBTC earned per PH/s since Jan 1, 2023.`ILido.getPooledEthByShares(1 ether)` stETH.Running cost to transact 1 gas every block since Jan 1, 2023.

returns._0: Tracks the balance accumulated by the `shares()`.

decimals().custom:example: If 1 `symbol()` (e.g. "PH/s") represents                 1e15 `shares()` (e.g. H/s)                 then `decimals()` should return 15.If 1 `symbol()` (e.g. "ystETH") represents                 1e18 `shares()` (e.g. wei)                 then `decimals()` should return 18.If 1 `symbol()` (e.g. "kgas") represents                 1e6 `shares()` (e.g. milligas per block)                 then `decimals()` should return 6.

returns._0: Decimal offset of `symbol()` vs indivisible units of `shares()`.

name().custom:example: "Bitcoin Mining Yield""Lido Staked Ethereum Yield""Gas Costs"

returns._0: A name suitable for display as a page title or heading.

shares().custom:example: 1e15 H/s.`ILido.getPooledEthByShares(1 ether)` stETH wei.1e3 milligas per block

returns._0: Short name of the display units of `shares()`.

balance().notice: This is not required to increase over time.         Clients SHOULD have defensive programming against underflow         when taking `balance() - initialBalance`.

balanceToken().notice: Clients MAY transact in any token which is pegged to         `balanceToken()`, as long as the `decimals()` match.         Clients SHOULD NOT transact in a token which is not pegged to         `balanceToken()`; the resulting financial contract will not         make sense.

shares().notice: Size of the position tracked by this index.         Clients SHOULD NOT assume that this value is constant.         Clients SHOULD denominate pool shares in the same denomination         as `ISilicaIndex.shares()` (see: `symbol()`, `decimals()`).
